tasks_remaining: Task 1: Create tournaments/models.py — dataclasses for Tournament, Bracket, Round, Match, Entry
Task 2: Create tournaments/bracket.py — single elimination bracket generation with advance() and coinflip
Task 3: Create tournaments/tournament.py — lifecycle orchestration with SQLite persistence
Task 4: Add arena endpoints — POST/GET /tournaments, POST /tournaments/{id}/advance, POST /tournaments/{id}/next
Task 5: Build bracket viewer — tournaments/viewer.html (self-contained, polls /bracket every 3s)
Task 6: Build admin panel — tournaments/admin.html (create, start next, force-advance, rematch)
learnings: Existing arena/db.py uses SQLite with RLock, row_factory=sqlite3.Row, WAL mode
Arena queue/match pattern: db methods return dict[str, Any], status strings like 'playing'/'completed'
vladfi1 libmelee fork — don't import melee in tournament code, no game dependency needed here
